exercises.name: Barbell Incline Shoulder Raise
instructions: Load the bar with an appropriate weight and adopt the starting position.
Pre-engage the serratus-anterior before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Shoulder Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand (or the indicated one) with an appropriate weight.
Pre-engage the serratus-anterior before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Smith Incline Shoulder Raises
instructions: Set the bar on the Smith machine at the right height.
Pre-engage the serratus-anterior before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.
